name: 逃离感化院 The Reformatory
short_description: Your name is Dewey. You enjoy playing video games, much to the dismay of your parents. One day, they send you to a reformatory. There, a man electroshocks you. In convulsions, you fall into a world filled with enemies. This is a top-down 2D pixel-style shooter game with roguelite elements.
detailed_description:
Your name is Dewey. You enjoy playing video games, much to the dismay of your parents. One day, they send you to a reformatory. There, a man electroshocks you. In convulsions, you fall into a world filled with enemies.

This is a top-down 2D pixel-style shooting game. It features Roguelite elements, with enemies, items, and traps in the levels being randomly generated. It is controlled using the keyboard and mouse. Currently, one chapter with 15 levels is available. There are 2 playable characters for the player to choose from, 3 types of weapons, 3 special abilities, 3 types of enemies, 1 boss, and several other items and traps. More content will be added in the future.
